title: Dead Space HP critico sprite tinting (hybrid HUD layer, additive a Tactics Ogre HP bar)
summary: Decision codified 2026-04-27 (hybrid HUD). HP critico sprite tinting (low HP = pulsing red interno body sprite) come layer ADDITIVO a Tactics Ogre HP bar floating (#1906 ha già HP critico pulse animation). Layered feedback: precise (bar) + emozionale (tint).
